case_title: JINDARLY INTERNATIONAL, LLC VS. ZENVIEW, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70880426) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE
